title: Fully Immersed
description: This modpack adds QOL features, great gameplay, and fully immerses the player in the world of Minecraft.
body:
Is minecraft not __*fun*__ anymore? Is survival sometimes… __*boring*__? Well, you found the **right** modpack!

This modpack will add **lots** of QOL (quality of life) features that *should* already be in the vanilla game + extra cool features!

Not enough? Is minecraft not __*immersive*__ enough? Well, it’s got more!

With mods like [ImmersiveMC](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersivemc), [Immersive Portals](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveportals), [First-person Model](https://modrinth.com/mod/first-person-model), [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations), and more you’re guaranteed to be __*fully Immersed*__ (and have lots of fun) in your Minecraft world!

This modpack is great for **singleplayer**, **multiplayer**, **survival**, and **creative**. Take a solo adventure, or bring your friends along to help you build, fight, and survive!

Along with all the great mods this modpack has to offer, it also has lots of performance optimization mods like [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Phosphor](https://modrinth.com/mod/phosphor), [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium), and more.

————————————————

Please make sure to check out the amazing mods and mod authors that made this modpack possible, without them, we wouldn’t have the awesome modding community we have today. All credit goes to them.
